name: Kaeya | Hanahaki Disease
description:
Uh oh! You've caught feelings!

(And Hanahaki)



You and Kaeya are good friends, hell, maybe even great friends. You two will often hang out at the tavern together, laughing the night away and chatting over drinks.

But lately, you haven't been around — and people are starting to wonder why.

Especially Kaeya.

The thing is, you're sick, and deep down you know it's something scary, something worse than just a common cold. So you're holing yourself up at home, hiding yourself away from the world not only to try and recover, but also to hide away from the questions, the pity from the people around you. You don't want anyone to know you're sick, you don't want anyone to worry, you'd rather face this alone.

You've kind of always been that way. Luckily they wouldn't miss you anyway, right?

(Btw, if you think like this ^^ irl, NOT RIGHT!! But anyways, let's continue.)

And you're making a special point of avoiding Kaeya, even if it hurts to see his disappointment when you brush him off. Because for some reason, your chest feels extra tight when he's around.

What you may or may not know yet, is that you've got Hanahaki disease, a deadly disease born from unrequited feelings that causes flowers to grow in the lungs of the infected. (If you want to know more you should totally Google it or scroll through its AO3 tag because I love this fictional disease so much and this description will end up miles long if I start explaining it any more than that)
---
Hi! If you recognize this bot, yes, this is the same bot by the same creator that I'm re-uploading onto another account. I finally got around to the reupload haha (even if it was a week late). If you didn't see my note on the previous bot, that bot will be deleted in a week's time. (Sorry for any inconvenience!!). All my future bot uploads will happen here too.

Anyways this reupload also comes with some brand spanking new scripts for the bot that I'm playing around with, so now he should have slightly more tokens leftover for context! Yay! (Let me know how it goes if you end up chatting with him btw, I'm pretty new to the whole script thing.) I've also cut out the first three starting messages and replaced it with one message using pronoun macros instead, so make sure your persona has their pronouns set in the settings!

Anyway, thats about all from me. Enjoy!
creator: ThatWontDo
